Observability

Langfuse LLM tracing and analytics

📈

Langfuse Observability

Langfuse runs as part of the local Docker stack at localhost:3000. Run docker compose up -d to start it.

To embed in cloud previews:

Set LANGFUSE_URL to your Langfuse Cloud or self-hosted URL in environment variables.

Langfuse hosting docs ↗
